narratives.Overview: Produce the Deft Cost Phase Gate artifact COST-ESTIMATE.md at the project root from the approved specification and current app shape (offline-capable PWA on Fly.io, no backend state). Plain-English USD bands so a human can Build / Rescope / No-build / Skip before further build work.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Create COST-ESTIMATE.md at repo root using .deft/core/templates/COST-ESTIMATE.md and .deft/core/references/cost-models.md. FR-2: Reflect real project costs only (Fly.io hosting, domain, light CI; no invented database/LLM/runtime APIs). FR-3: Leave Decision recorded blank until the operator picks Build / Rescope / No-build / Skip. NFR-1: Non-technical plain English; loose low/typical/high bands. NFR-2: Do not commit unless asked; do not touch triage cache noise.

items.title: Draft COST-ESTIMATE.md from Deft template + project facts
Surface decision point menu to operator
Record Build decision and close cost phase
